text:
THE Paris 2024 Olympic Games may be over but the memories will linger, especially for a lucky group of Jamaicans who experienced it first-hand, thanks to Red Stripe’s Guh Fi Gold and Glory Olympic Campaign.

The winners, who were randomly chosen from across the island after purchasing a six-pack of Red Stripe, embarked on a Parisian adventure to cheer on Team Jamaica as the athletes pushed for medals.

Arriving in Paris on August 2 and returning to the island on August 7, the 10-member party explored iconic French landmarks like the Eiffel Tower, Louvre Museum, Puma House, and Jamaica House.

The winners returned with unforgettable memories, new friendships, and a deepened pride in their heritage and athletic prowess. Amidst waving flags, the clatter of pot covers, and joyous cheers, they represented the heart and soul of Jamaicans back home, passionately supporting their athletes as they went for gold.





HOUSE RULES
title: An unforgettable Olympic adventure - Jamaica Observer
